/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/main_single.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/infer/fastbev_infer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/loader/nuscenes_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/backproject/backproject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/postprocess/postprocess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/visualize/visualize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastbev_infer.dir/optimize/bev_pool.cpp.o -o fastbev_infer   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.7/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.7/lib64:/usr/local/lib libbev_pool_cuda.a /usr/local/cuda-11.7/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.10.0
